name: FitPal
description: FitPal is a workout tracking app that helps users track their exercise routines and monitor their progress. It provides a simple and customizable way to log workouts and track fitness goals.
features: Workout tracking with customizable exercises and routines
Progress analytics and insights for strength, cardio, and flexibility
Optional integration with wearable devices or fitness trackers
target_audience: Fitness enthusiasts, athletes, and individuals looking to improve their physical health
